strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and modern testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest)
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP integration, aligning with emerging tech trends
Strong architecture and scalability focus demonstrated in high-traffic systems (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests)
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js, a primary stack requirement
No explicit mention of PostgreSQL or MySQL, though MongoDB is listed
AI agent development experience exists, but depth in enterprise automation tooling is unclear

key_factors.factor: AI agent infrastructure and emerging tech adoption

response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack credentials with TypeScript/Node.js and modern tooling, plus leadership in AI-agent work. However, the lack of Nest.js and explicit relational database experience introduces risk. His diverse background and problem-solving track record partially mitigate these concerns.
